member.name: T:Havit.Blazor.Storage.Exceptions.StorageIndexOutOfRangeException
member.summary: Thrown when the requested zero-based index is out of range of the keys present in the browser storage area (localStorage or sessionStorage).

member.name: T:Havit.Blazor.Storage.Exceptions.StorageKeyNotFoundException
member.summary: Thrown when the requested key is not present in the browser storage area (localStorage or sessionStorage).

member.name: T:Havit.Blazor.Storage.Exceptions.StorageNotAvailableException
member.summary: Thrown when the requested browser storage area (localStorage or sessionStorage) is not accessible, for example, when the user disabled it in the browser or access is blocked by the browser privacy settings.

member.name: T:Havit.Blazor.Storage.IBrowserStorage
member.summary: Provides access to a browser Web Storage area (localStorage or sessionStorage).

member.name: M:Havit.Blazor.Storage.IBrowserStorage.TryGetStringValue(System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Tries to get the string value stored under the given .
member.param: The stored value when the key is present; otherwise null.
member.returns: true when the key is present; otherwise false.
member.exception: Thrown when the underlying storage area is not accessible.
Thrown when the IJSInProcessRuntime is not available (not in Interactive WebAssembly mode).
Thrown when the is null or whitespace.

member.name: M:Havit.Blazor.Storage.IBrowserStorage.TryGetValue``1(System.String,``0@,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Tries to get the value stored under the given deserialized from JSON.
member.param: The deserialized value when the key is present; otherwise the default value of .
The serializer options to use. When null, the options configured during the service registration are used.
member.returns: true when the key is present; otherwise false.
member.exception: Thrown when the underlying storage area is not accessible.
Thrown when the IJSInProcessRuntime is not available (not in Interactive WebAssembly mode).
Thrown when the is null or whitespace.

member.name: M:Havit.Blazor.Storage.IBrowserStorage.Remove(System.String)
member.summary: Removes the value stored under the given .
member.exception: Thrown when the underlying storage area is not accessible.
Thrown when the IJSInProcessRuntime is not available (not in Interactive WebAssembly mode).
Thrown when the is null or whitespace.

member.name: M:Havit.Blazor.Storage.IBrowserStorage.Clear
member.summary: Removes all keys from the storage area.
member.exception: Thrown when the underlying storage area is not accessible.
Thrown when the IJSInProcessRuntime is not available (not in Interactive WebAssembly mode).

member.name: M:Havit.Blazor.Storage.IBrowserStorage.GetLength
member.summary: Returns the number of keys stored in the storage area.
member.exception: Thrown when the underlying storage area is not accessible.
Thrown when the IJSInProcessRuntime is not available (not in Interactive WebAssembly mode).

member.name: M:Havit.Blazor.Storage.IBrowserStorage.GetKeyByIndex(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the name of the key at the given zero-based .
member.param: The zero-based index of the key.
member.exception: Thrown when the is out of range.
Thrown when the underlying storage area is not accessible.
Thrown when the IJSInProcessRuntime is not available (not in Interactive WebAssembly mode).

member.name: M:Havit.Blazor.Storage.IBrowserStorage.TryGetKeyByIndex(System.Int32,System.String@)
member.summary: Tries to get the name of the key at the given zero-based .
member.param: The zero-based index of the key.
The name of the key when the is in range; otherwise null.
member.returns: true when the is in range; otherwise false.
member.exception: Thrown when the underlying storage area is not accessible.
Thrown when the IJSInProcessRuntime is not available (not in Interactive WebAssembly mode).

member.name: M:Havit.Blazor.Storage.IBrowserStorage.SetStringValue(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Stores the given string under the given .
member.exception: Thrown when the underlying storage area is not accessible.
Thrown when the IJSInProcessRuntime is not available (not in Interactive WebAssembly mode).
Thrown when the is null or whitespace.
Thrown when the is null.

member.name: M:Havit.Blazor.Storage.IBrowserStorage.SetValue``1(System.String,``0,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Serializes to JSON and stores it under the given .
member.param: The key to store the value under.
The serializer options to use. When null, the options configured during the service registration are used.
member.exception: Thrown when the underlying storage area is not accessible.
Thrown when the IJSInProcessRuntime is not available (not in Interactive WebAssembly mode).
Thrown when the is null or whitespace.
Thrown when the is null.

member.name: M:Havit.Blazor.Storage.IBrowserStorage.GetStringValue(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the string value stored under the given .
member.exception: Thrown when the key is not present.
Thrown when the underlying storage area is not accessible.
Thrown when the IJSInProcessRuntime is not available (not in Interactive WebAssembly mode).
Thrown when the is null or whitespace.

member.name: M:Havit.Blazor.Storage.IBrowserStorage.GetValue``1(System.String,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Returns the value stored under the given deserialized from JSON.
member.param: The serializer options to use. When null, the options configured during the service registration are used.
member.exception: Thrown when the key is not present.
Thrown when the underlying storage area is not accessible.
Thrown when the IJSInProcessRuntime is not available (not in Interactive WebAssembly mode).
Thrown when the is null or whitespace.

member.name: M:Havit.Blazor.Storage.IBrowserStorage.TryGetStringValueAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Tries to get the string value stored under the given .
member.returns: A tuple where Success indicates whether the key is present and Value contains the stored value (or null when the key is not present).
member.exception: Thrown when the underlying storage area is not accessible.
Thrown when the is null or whitespace.

member.name: M:Havit.Blazor.Storage.IBrowserStorage.TryGetValueAsync``1(System.String,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Tries to get the value stored under the given deserialized from JSON.
member.param: The serializer options to use. When null, the options configured during the service registration are used.
member.returns: A tuple where Success indicates whether the key is present and Value contains the deserialized value (or the default value of when the key is not present).
member.exception: Thrown when the underlying storage area is not accessible.
Thrown when the is null or whitespace.

member.summary: Removes the value stored under the given .
member.exception: Thrown when the underlying storage area is not accessible.
Thrown when the is null or whitespace.

member.summary: Removes all keys from the storage area.
member.exception: Thrown when the underlying storage area is not accessible.

member.name: M:Havit.Blazor.Storage.IBrowserStorage.GetLengthAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the number of keys stored in the storage area.
member.exception: Thrown when the underlying storage area is not accessible.

member.summary: Returns the name of the key at the given zero-based .
member.param: The zero-based index of the key.
member.exception: Thrown when the is out of range.
Thrown when the underlying storage area is not accessible.

member.name: M:Havit.Blazor.Storage.IBrowserStorage.TryGetKeyByIndexAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Tries to get the name of the key at the given zero-based .
member.param: The zero-based index of the key.
member.returns: A tuple where Success indicates whether the is in range and Key contains the name of the key (or null when the is out of range).
member.exception: Thrown when the underlying storage area is not accessible.

member.name: T:Havit.Blazor.Storage.ILocalStorageService
member.summary: Provides access to the browser window.localStorage area.

member.name: T:Havit.Blazor.Storage.Infrastructure.BrowserStorageAccessor
member.summary: Shared implementation of the browser storage access. It contains the actual JS Interop calls and accepts a parameter that determines which storage area (localStorage or sessionStorage) is accessed. The public and implementations only delegate to this class passing the correct .

member.name: M:Havit.Blazor.Storage.Infrastructure.BrowserStorageAccessor.#ctor(Microsoft.JSInterop.IJSRuntime,Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{Havit.Blazor.Storage.StorageServiceOptions})
member.summary: Shared implementation of the browser storage access. It contains the actual JS Interop calls and accepts a parameter that determines which storage area (localStorage or sessionStorage) is accessed. The public and implementations only delegate to this class passing the correct .

member.name: T:Havit.Blazor.Storage.Infrastructure.BrowserStorageService
member.summary: Base class for the browser storage services. It delegates all calls to the shared passing the of the concrete service.

member.name: M:Havit.Blazor.Storage.Infrastructure.BrowserStorageService.#ctor(Havit.Blazor.Storage.Infrastructure.BrowserStorageAccessor)
member.summary: Base class for the browser storage services. It delegates all calls to the shared passing the of the concrete service.

member.name: T:Havit.Blazor.Storage.Infrastructure.BrowserStorageType
member.summary: Identifies which Web Storage area is accessed.

member.name: F:Havit.Blazor.Storage.Infrastructure.BrowserStorageType.Local
member.summary: The window.localStorage area.

member.name: F:Havit.Blazor.Storage.Infrastructure.BrowserStorageType.Session
member.summary: The window.sessionStorage area.

member.name: T:Havit.Blazor.Storage.ISessionStorageService
member.summary: Provides access to the browser window.sessionStorage area.

member.name: T:Havit.Blazor.Storage.StorageServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: extensions for registering the browser storage services ( and ).

member.name: M:Havit.Blazor.Storage.StorageServiceCollectionExtensions.AddHavitBlazorStorage(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Havit.Blazor.Storage.StorageServiceOptions},Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceLifetime)
member.summary: Registers and providing access to the browser localStorage and sessionStorage.
member.param: An optional delegate to configure the (e.g. the default used by SetValue/GetValue when no options are passed to the call).
The lifetime to use for the registered services. The default is .

member.name: M:Havit.Blazor.Storage.StorageServiceCollectionExtensions.AddHavitBlazorStorage(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions,Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceLifetime)
member.summary: Registers and providing access to the browser localStorage and sessionStorage.
member.param: The default used by SetValue/GetValue when no options are passed to the call.
The lifetime to use for the registered services. The default is .

member.name: T:Havit.Blazor.Storage.StorageServiceOptions
member.summary: Options for the browser storage services ( and ).

member.name: P:Havit.Blazor.Storage.StorageServiceOptions.JsonSerializerOptions
member.summary: Default used by SetValue/GetValue (and their async variants) when no options are passed to the method call. When null, the default behavior is used.
